settings.profile.title: Profile
finance.title: Finance
finance.description: Manage your payouts, balances, and tax settings.
eventTypes.title: Event Types
eventTypes.description: Define the services patients can book with you.
eventTypes.createDescription: Define a new bookable service for your patients.
eventTypes.editDescription: Update this event type's details and booking rules.
eventTypes.empty: You haven't created any event types yet.
eventTypes.error.no-profile: Your expert profile was not found.
eventTypes.error.toggle-failed: Could not update the event type. Please try again.
eventTypes.error.delete-failed: Could not delete the event type. Please try again.
eventTypes.error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
eventTypes.actions.deleteDescription: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the event type and all associated data.
schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.description: Set your weekly availability and date overrides.
schedule.error.startBeforeEnd: {day}: start time must be before end time
schedule.error.overrideStartBeforeEnd: Override start time must be before end time
calendars.title: Connected Calendars
calendars.description: Connect your Google or Microsoft calendar to avoid double bookings.
calendars.connectDescription: Link your Google or Microsoft account so Eleva can check your availability and create session events.
calendars.connectHint: Your calendar credentials are managed securely by WorkOS. Eleva never stores your password.
calendars.disconnectConfirm: Disconnect this calendar? Eleva will no longer check availability or create events.
calendars.noCalendarFallback: No calendar connected. Your schedule is managed in Eleva and you will receive .ics email invites for each booking.
calendars.connectUnavailable: Calendar connection is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
calendars.error.no-profile: Your expert profile was not found.
calendars.error.unauthorized-calendar: You do not have access to this calendar integration.
calendars.error.disconnect-failed: Could not disconnect the calendar. Please try again.
calendars.error.load-failed: Could not load calendar data. Please try again.
calendars.error.save-failed: Could not save calendar settings. Please try again.
integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.description: Connect calendars, invoicing tools, and other services to your Eleva practice.
integrations.connectViaPipes: Connect via your account settings to enable this integration.
errors.unauthorized: You do not have access to this page.
